description:

 Infrabyte Consulting is offering an opportunity for individuals who want to build complete web solutions and understand how real\\-world applications are developed. As a Web Developer Intern, you will work on both frontend and backend aspects of web projects while gaining practical exposure to modern development practices.
 



  





 Role Overview
 



 This internship focuses on developing end\\-to\\-end web applications. You will learn how different components of a website or application work together, from user interface to server\\-side logic and database handling.
 



  





 Your Day\\-to\\-Day Work
 



 \\* Develop and maintain web applications using modern technologies

 \\* Basic knowledge of backend technologies such as Node.js, Python, or PHP

 \\* Knowledge of Git/GitHub is preferred
 



 \\* Strong problem\\-solving and logical thinking skills

 Who This Role Is For

 \\* Freshers interested in web development

 What You Will Get
 



 \\* ₹18,500 monthly stipend

 \\* Opportunity to build a strong development portfolio
 



 \\* A practical and growth\\-focused learning environment
 



  





 This internship is ideal for individuals who want to start their career in web development and gain real\\-world experience in building and maintaining web applications.

title: Senior Full Stack Engineer – Cloud & AI Applications
description:
**Last date to apply:**
 10 March 2026
   

  

**Senior Full Stack Engineer – Cloud \\& AI Applications**
**Job Family:** 
 Digital / Software Engineering
   

  

**Location:** 
 Navi Mumbai
   

  

**Role Overview**
 We are looking for a highly capable
 **Senior Full Stack Engineer** 
 with strong foundations in front end development,
 **cloud engineering, data pipelines, and modern software architecture** 
 , and a growing or established focus on
 **AI\\-enabled applications** 
 .
   

  

 This role spans frontend development, backend systems, cloud infrastructure, and AI integrations. You will design and build secure, scalable digital products that leverage modern cloud platforms and AI/ML capabilities to drive intelligent workflows and user experiences.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Full Stack Application Development
* Design and build scalable web applications using React with strong HTML/CSS fundamentals.
* Develop and maintain robust backend services using Node.js (TypeScript) or Python.
* Design and manage RESTful APIs, including lifecycle management and versioning.
* Implement reliability patterns such as idempotency, retries, structured error handling, and resilient service communication.
* Collaborate closely with product, design, and data teams to deliver high\\-quality user\\-facing features.
* Cloud\\-native Software Engineering (AWS / Azure)
* Design, deploy, and operate applications on AWS or Azure.
* Build and manage container\\-based platforms (Docker, Kubernetes).
* Work with compute, storage, database services, networking, and traffic management.
* Implement IAM and least\\-privilege access control.
* Define and manage infrastructure using Infrastructure as Code (IaC).
* Own CI/CD pipelines, including multi\\-environment promotion (dev/QA/prod), rollback strategies, and production safeguards.
* Software Engineering for AI
* Design and operate scalable data pipelines using Databricks or Python\\-based ETL frameworks.
* Work with PostgreSQL/SQL databases, NoSQL systems, and modern lakehouse architectures.
* Integrate AI/ML services into applications (LLM\\-based services, embeddings, inference APIs).
* Build systems that support near\\-real\\-time data ingestion for AI\\-enabled workflows.
* Collaborate on AI system observability, evaluation, and monitoring in production environments.
* Frontend \\& UI/UX
* Advanced UI architecture patterns (micro\\-frontends, design systems).
* Strong UX sensibility and experience working closely with product/design teams.
* Performance optimization and frontend observability.
* Experience building AI\\-driven UI components (chat interfaces, dynamic workflows).
* Security, Governance \\& Operational Excellence
* Apply security\\-by\\-design and zero\\-trust architecture principles across cloud and APIs.
* Implement OAuth2 / JWT\\-based authentication and authorization.
* Ensure safe API exposure and external system integration.
* Contribute to monitoring, alerting, incident response, and root\\-cause analysis.
* Make reliability, performance, and cost\\-aware engineering decisions.
* Engineering Practices \\& Collaboration
* Follow structured Git workflows and strong documentation practices.
* Use agentic AI\\-supported coding tools responsibly to improve delivery quality.
* Communicate clearly with cross\\-functional stakeholders.
* (Lead) Define engineering standards and mentor junior engineers.
* (Lead) Drive architectural alignment across frontend, backend, cloud, and AI components.


**Required Skills \\& Experience**
* Strong experience as a Full Stack Engineer in production environments.
* Expertise in React, modern JavaScript/TypeScript, and UI integration.
* Strong backend development experience (Node.js/TypeScript or Python).
* Hands\\-on experience with AWS or Azure, Docker, and CI/CD.
* Experience designing secure, scalable APIs with OAuth2/JWT.
* Solid understanding of cloud networking, IAM, and secure architecture.
* Experience working with structured data systems (PostgreSQL/SQL).
* Strong problem\\-solving skills and ownership mindset.


**Good To Have (Preferred Capabilities)**
* Cloud \\& Platform Engineering
* Deep Kubernetes expertise and production\\-grade cluster operations.
* Advanced Infrastructure as Code (Terraform/Bicep/CloudFormation).
* Experience with secrets management and network isolation strategies.
* Cost optimization and performance tuning in cloud\\-native environments.
* Experience operating distributed systems at scale.
* AI / ML \\& Agentic Systems
* Experience building or integrating LLM\\-based applications.
* Knowledge of RAG architectures, embeddings, and vector databases.
* Experience with frameworks such as LangChain, LangGraph, CrewAI, or AutoGen.
* Familiarity with Databricks\\-based ML pipelines.
* Understanding of MLOps / LLMOps, model lifecycle management, and observability.
* Experience designing multi\\-agent or agentic workflows.
* NLP or language\\-centric AI experience.


**Who You Are**
* You combine strong software engineering fundamentals with modern cloud capabilities.
* You are comfortable moving between frontend, backend, infrastructure, and AI integration.
* You think in systems, not just features.
* You take ownership from design to production.


 You are pragmatic and and able to make sound architectural trade\\-offs.

title: Remote Data Engineer
description:
**About The Company**
 Turing is a leading research accelerator based in San Francisco, California, dedicated to advancing frontier AI research and supporting the deployment of sophisticated AI systems across the globe. As a trusted partner for enterprises, Turing specializes in accelerating research with high\\-quality data, innovative training pipelines, and top\\-tier AI researchers skilled in coding, reasoning, STEM disciplines, multilinguality, multimodality, and autonomous agents. The company’s mission is to transform AI from experimental proof of concept into reliable, proprietary intelligence systems that deliver measurable impact and sustainable results. Turing’s commitment to innovation and excellence positions it at the forefront of AI development, enabling clients to harness the full potential of artificial intelligence to solve complex real\\-world problems.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking experienced Software Engineers (SWE Bench \\- Data Engineer / Data Science) to join our team and contribute to benchmark\\-driven evaluation projects focused on real\\-world data workflows. This role involves hands\\-on work with production\\-like datasets, designing and building data pipelines, and performing data science tasks to evaluate and enhance the performance of advanced AI systems. The ideal candidate will have a strong foundation in data engineering and data science, capable of working across data preparation, analysis, and model\\-related workflows within complex codebases.
   

  

 This position offers an exciting opportunity to work on challenging data engineering and data science problems, collaborating with research and engineering teams to develop robust evaluation frameworks that push the boundaries of AI performance assessment. Your contributions will directly influence the development and deployment of cutting\\-edge AI models, ensuring they meet high standards of quality, reliability, and reproducibility.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Work with structured and unstructured datasets to support SWE Bench\\-style evaluation tasks, ensuring data integrity and usability.
* Design, develop, and validate data pipelines used in benchmarking and evaluation workflows, optimizing for performance and scalability.
* Perform data processing, analysis, feature engineering, and validation to support various data science use cases and experiments.
* Write, test, and modify Python scripts to process data efficiently, enabling local experimentation and validation.
* Assess data quality, transformations, and output results to guarantee correctness, consistency, and reproducibility across projects.
* Create clean, well\\-documented, and reusable data workflows that facilitate benchmarking and future research efforts.
* Participate in code reviews to uphold high standards of code quality, readability, and maintainability.
* Collaborate closely with researchers and engineers to design complex, real\\-world data engineering and data science tasks that challenge AI systems and improve evaluation metrics.


**Qualifications**
* Minimum of 3\\+ years of professional experience as a Data Engineer, Data Scientist, or Software Engineer with a focus on data workflows.
* Strong proficiency in Python, with extensive experience in data processing and scientific computing.
* Proven experience working with both structured and unstructured data sources.
* Solid understanding of machine learning fundamentals and data science principles.
* Ability to navigate, understand, and modify complex, real\\-world codebases effectively.
* Demonstrated capability to write readable, reusable, and well\\-documented code.
* Strong problem\\-solving skills, particularly in algorithmic and data\\-intensive contexts.
* Excellent communication skills in spoken and written English, with the ability to articulate technical concepts clearly.


**Benefits**
* Opportunity to work remotely from anywhere, providing flexibility and work\\-life balance.
* Engagement on cutting\\-edge AI projects with leading language model companies and research labs.
* Collaborative environment that fosters innovation and professional growth.
* Access to a network of top AI researchers and engineers, offering continuous learning opportunities.
* Participation in impactful projects that contribute to the advancement of artificial intelligence technology.


 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 Turing is committed to creating an inclusive environment and is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, disability, or any other protected status. We believe diversity enriches our team and enhances our ability to innovate and solve complex challenges. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to any protected characteristic.

title: Senior Software Engineer
description:
**Senior Software Engineer** 




**LightSpun \\| Bengaluru \\| Hybrid** 




  





**About LightSpun** 




 LightSpun is transforming the $200B dental insurance industry through cutting\\-edge AI automation. We're replacing decades\\-old manual processes with intelligent systems that reduce credentialing times from weeks to hours, slash administrative costs by 50%, and enable providers to focus on patient care instead of paperwork.
 



 Backed by leading investors and working with major insurance carriers, we're building the digital infrastructure that will power the future of dental benefits administration. If you're passionate about using technology to solve complex healthcare problems at scale, we want to talk to you.
 



  





**The Opportunity** 




 As a Senior Software Engineer, you'll be a key technical contributor in building our AI\\-powered platform that's reimagining how dental insurance works. You'll architect and develop Python\\-based microservices that process millions of claims, automate complex workflows, and directly impact the healthcare experience for providers and patients nationwide.
 



 This is a hybrid role based in Bengaluru, offering the perfect balance of collaborative in\\-office work and remote flexibility.
 



  





**What You'll Do** 



* **Build Microservices:** 
 Design and develop high\\-performance Python microservices using FastAPI that handle insurance transactions at scale
* **API Development:** 
 Create robust, well\\-documented RESTful APIs with FastAPI and GraphQL endpoints using Strawberry that connect providers, insurers, and patients in real\\-time
* **Cloud Architecture:** 
 Leverage Google Cloud Platform services (Cloud Run, Pub/Sub, Cloud SQL) to build scalable, resilient systems
* **Database Design:** 
 Optimize PostgreSQL schemas and queries for complex insurance data models and high\\-throughput operations
* **AI Integration:** 
 Collaborate with our ML team to deploy AI models into production using FastAPI endpoints
* **Service Orchestration:** 
 Design inter\\-service communication patterns and implement event\\-driven architectures within our microservices ecosystem
* **Infrastructure as Code:** 
 Define and manage cloud infrastructure using Pulumi with Python
* **Performance Optimization:** 
 Profile and optimize Python code, database queries, and API response times
* **Technical Leadership:** 
 Mentor junior engineers, establish FastAPI best practices, and drive code quality standards



  





**What We're Looking For** 




**Required Qualifications:** 



* 5\\+ years of software development experience with strong Python expertise
* Production experience with
 **FastAPI** 
 or similar Python web frameworks (Flask, Django)
* Proven track record building and maintaining
 **microservices architectures**
* Strong experience with
 **PostgreSQL** 
 including complex queries, indexing strategies, and performance tuning
* Hands\\-on experience with
 **Google Cloud Platform** 
 services (Cloud Run, Cloud SQL, Pub/Sub, Cloud Storage)
* Deep understanding of RESTful API design, async programming in Python, and API documentation standards
* Experience with containerization (Docker) and orchestration in GCP
* Solid grasp of Python best practices, including type hints, testing (pytest), and code organization
* Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science or equivalent practical experience



  





**Preferred Qualifications:** 



* Experience with FastAPI's advanced features: dependency injection, background tasks, WebSockets
* Experience with GraphQL implementation using Strawberry GraphQL
* Knowledge of Python async/await patterns and asyncio
* Experience with Pulumi for infrastructure as code
* Familiarity with Google Cloud's AI/ML services (Vertex AI, Cloud AI Platform)
* Experience with event\\-driven architectures using Google Pub/Sub
* Understanding of PostgreSQL advanced features: JSONB, full\\-text search, partitioning
* Experience with healthcare technology, insurance systems, or regulated industries
* Knowledge of HIPAA compliance and healthcare data standards
* Experience with SQLAlchemy ORM and Alembic migrations
* Familiarity with Google Cloud monitoring tools (Cloud Monitoring, Cloud Logging, Cloud Trace)



  





**Our Tech Stack** 



* **Backend:** 
 Python 3\\.11\\+, FastAPI, Pydantic, SQLAlchemy
* **Database:** 
 PostgreSQL 15\\+, Redis
* **Cloud Platform:** 
 Google Cloud Platform (Cloud Run, Cloud SQL, Pub/Sub, Cloud Storage, Secret Manager)
* **Infrastructure:** 
 Docker, Cloud Build, Pulumi, GitHub Actions
* **Monitoring:** 
 Google Cloud Operations Suite
* **Testing:** 
 pytest, pytest\\-asyncio
* **API Tools:** 
 OpenAPI/Swagger, Strawberry GraphQL, Postman



  





**What Makes This Role Special** 



* **Modern Stack:** 
 Work with FastAPI and modern Python tooling including GraphQL with Strawberry
* **Microservices at Scale:** 
 Design and implement true microservices architecture on Google Cloud
* **Infrastructure as Code:** 
 Use Pulumi with Python for managing cloud infrastructure
* **Impact:** 
 Your code will directly improve healthcare access for millions of patients
* **Growth:** 
 Join during our scaling phase with opportunities for technical leadership
* **Innovation:** 
 Integrate cutting\\-edge AI with FastAPI to solve real\\-world problems
* **Culture:** 
 Collaborative, fast\\-paced environment where engineering excellence is valued



  





**Key Projects You Might Work On** 



* Building high\\-throughput FastAPI services processing 100K\\+ claims daily
* Implementing GraphQL APIs with Strawberry for flexible data querying
* Designing PostgreSQL schemas for complex insurance eligibility rules
* Implementing real\\-time event streaming with Google Pub/Sub
* Creating async Python workers for AI\\-powered document processing
* Managing infrastructure as code using Pulumi with Python
* Optimizing API response times to sub\\-100ms for critical endpoints



  





**Benefits \\& Perks** 



* Competitive salary and equity compensation
* Comprehensive health insurance
* Flexible work arrangements
* Learning \\& development budget (conferences, courses, certifications)
* Latest MacBook Pro and tech setup
* Quarterly team offsites
* Google Cloud certification sponsorship



  





*LightSpun is an equal opportunity employer committed to building a diverse and inclusive team.* 




  





**Ready to revolutionize dental insurance?** 
 Apply now and help us build the future of healthcare technology.
